data.content: Revised section 5 (execution-backend rollbackIteration tests) to match actual contract: unknown lease returns NOT_FOUND error (not silent success). Added 3 new edge-case tests (updateKnot failure retains lease, falsy note skips block, non-knots repo skips block) for 6 total in that section. Sections 1-4 unchanged. Updated child knot d164 with corrected test plan. Ready for re-review.
